mapper.select:
SELECT id, questionnaire_code, questionnaire_name, questionnaire_version, description, total_score, passing_score, time_limit, status, is_default, sort_order, created_by, created_at, updated_at, FROM risk_assessment_questionnaire WHERE 1 = 1
AND questionnaire_code LIKE CONCAT('%',#{queryFrom.questionnaireCode},'%')
AND questionnaire_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{queryFrom.questionnaireName},'%')
ORDER BY created_at DESC
